source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown, transistors \( Q_1 \) and \( Q_2 \) are biased at a collector current of 2.6 mA. Assuming that transistor current gains are sufficiently large to assume collector current equal to emitter current and thermal voltage of 26 mV, the magnitude of voltage gain \( \frac{V_0}{V_s} \) in the mid-band frequency range is _________ (up to second decimal place).
